title: Azalea
description: A simple recourse pack to add a botanical twist on your basic stone tools.
body:
================================================================================

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4104286a6b1b3c50fd37d157a68336c29e8037e.png)

================================================================================

Sick of stone? Try adding some **greenery** to it!


Changes all stone tools and stone tool names!


Stone sword -> Overgrown sword

Stone pickaxe -> Overgrown pickaxe

Stone axe -> Overgrown axe

Etc...

================================================================================

Enjoy your new lively tools! ~Freebeam


![Some tools left after death overgrowing with plant life!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9f935acca5374e8ab4951819b74b2bc3f4325c7.png)

================================================================================
